span.p:
VESTIGIAL abstract base class.
Sphere and Spheroid do NOT inherit it.
Only Bacilli inherits (but Bacilli is dead code).
Included by 4 files but provides nothing they use.
CellParams is in ConfigTypes.hpp, not here.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
STANDALONE class — does NOT inherit Cell.
Src: src/Cells/Spheroid.cpp
Hdr: includes/Spheroid.hpp
Includes Cell.hpp unnecessarily.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: DEAD CODE — compiled via CMakeLists but\nnever instantiated. CellFactory only creates\nSpheroid. Does NOT inherit Cell.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: DEAD CODE — not in CMakeLists.txt.\nReferences undefined Rectangle class.\nWould not compile.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
costOfPerturb and getSynthPerturbedCells
take const Cell& oldCell but NEVER USE IT.
gradientDescent() entirely commented out
(80 lines of dead code in Frame.cpp:491-571).

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: ORPHANED — defined in mathhelper.hpp\nbut not included by any active file.
